hook.text: Does endo in the POD get worse over time?
hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: curiosity and concern about disease progression
hook.target_audience_raw: people with endometriosis, especially those with POD involvement, and anyone concerned about disease progression

main_claim.text: Endometriosis, if not managed or not responsive to surgery, can get worse over time regardless of location.

supporting_explanation.summary: The speaker states that all endometriosis tissue can worsen if it is not properly managed or does not respond well to surgical procedures, and this applies to any location including the pouch of Douglas.

funnel_rationale: The video addresses a general question about disease progression, raising awareness about the potential for worsening, which is suitable for top-of-funnel educational content.

secondary_raw: endometriosis in the pouch of Douglas

speaker.primary_raw: medical professional (likely OB/GYN or endometriosis specialist)
